prompt: Create a moody, realistic vertical photograph of an adult woman in a dimly lit room, leaning forward on a sofa or bed while looking down at a glowing smartphone near the bottom right edge of the frame. She has dark brown hair tied in a messy bun, her head angled downward so most facial features are hidden, with one ear and the side of her neck visible. She wears a loose, semi-sheer white robe or oversized shirt with a draped neckline and soft folds, giving a quiet late-night intimate atmosphere without nudity. Add a large opaque rectangular censor block over the face area, positioned from the right-center of the image across the head and upper face, colored dark muted brown. Use low-key naturalistic lighting, with the smartphone casting a small cool white-blue glow on her hand and sleeve, while the background remains dark, blurred, and brown-gray. Compose as a close vertical crop, subject filling most of the frame, shoulder and robe on the left, face area on the upper right, hand and phone at the bottom right. Photographic style: soft grain, shallow depth of field, muted colors, subdued contrast, candid cinematic realism, no text, no watermark.
